title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: IRCO PACIFIC ISLANDER AND ASIAN FAMILY CENTER UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency financial assistance for electric, gas, and heating fuel (oil, wood, propane) when appointments are available. 8040 NE Sandy Boulevard Suite 200 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Household income at or below 60% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) Hours: Open Friday, April 17, 2026 until capacity is reached for Pacific Power (PPL) Email (503) 235-4932 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message Phone (503) 235-4932 Energy Hotline Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment when the line is open. Leave a message with the applicant's name, phone number, Social Security number, and utility company name to request an appointment. Please speak clearly and slowly. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: For appointments, must bring all of the following: -Current utility bill in applicant's name -Social Security cards for all household members -Photo ID for all adults in the household -Proof of income for the past 30 days for all adults in the household (TANF, SSI, unemployment, pay stubs, pension, child support, etc.). If any adult in the household has no income, they must come to the appointment with the applicant. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 12 and 72 Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH ACADEMIC SUPPORT AND PARENT ENGAGEMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH NAVIGATION HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY RENTAL ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE FOR FAMILIES WITH CHILDREN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ASIAN AND PACIFIC ISLANDER DEVELOPMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SERVICES AGAINST EXPLOITATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH MENTORING LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - GANG PREVENTION AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - FAMILY PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IRCO PACIFIC ISLANDER AND ASIAN FAMILY CENTER
